groups.title: Foreground (fg)
groups.description: Navigation foreground colors across standard interaction states

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.fg.enabled
tokens.description: Foreground for Navigation. Enabled state: Use for text and icons in the default, ready-to-interact state.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.fg.hover
tokens.description: Foreground for Navigation. Hover state: Use for text and icons when a pointer enters the navigation item.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.fg.focus
tokens.description: Foreground for Navigation. Focus state: Use for text and icons when a navigation item receives keyboard focus.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.fg.pressed
tokens.description: Foreground for Navigation. Pressed state: Use for text and icons during an active click or tap on a navigation item.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.fg.selected
tokens.description: Foreground for Navigation. Selected state: Use for text and icons on the currently active navigation item.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.fg.disabled
tokens.description: Foreground for Navigation. Disabled state: Use for text and icons on navigation items not available for interaction.

groups.title: Background (bg)
groups.description: Navigation background colors across standard interaction states

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.bg.enabled
tokens.description: Background for Navigation. Enabled state: Use for the surface of a navigation item in its default state.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.bg.hover
tokens.description: Background for Navigation. Hover state: Use for the surface of a navigation item when a pointer enters it.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.bg.focus
tokens.description: Background for Navigation. Focus state: Use for the surface of a navigation item that receives keyboard focus.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.bg.pressed
tokens.description: Background for Navigation. Pressed state: Use for the surface of a navigation item during an active click or tap.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.bg.selected
tokens.description: Background for Navigation. Selected state: Use for the surface of the currently active navigation item.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.bg.disabled
tokens.description: Background for Navigation. Disabled state: Use for the surface of navigation items not available for interaction.

groups.title: Border
groups.description: Navigation border colors across standard interaction states

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.border.enabled
tokens.description: Border for Navigation. Enabled state: Transparent — no visible border on navigation items in the default rest state.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.border.hover
tokens.description: Border for Navigation. Hover state: Subtle indicator line on navigation items when a pointer enters.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.border.focus
tokens.description: Border for Navigation. Focus state: Subtle indicator line on navigation items that receive keyboard focus.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.border.pressed
tokens.description: Border for Navigation. Pressed state: Brand-red indicator line during an active click or tap.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.border.selected
tokens.description: Border for Navigation. Selected state: Brand-red indicator line marking the currently active navigation item.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.navigation.border.disabled
tokens.description: Border for Navigation. Disabled state: Muted indicator line on navigation items not available for interaction.
